package_salary.ppo_ctc: For Tech roles –Android Developer, Full Stack Owner, UI/UX Designer, iOS Developer Stipend details - Parameters Amount Fixed ₹ 32,000 Professional Allowance ₹ 3,000 Release Allowance ₹ 3,000 Lead Allowance ₹ 2,000 Total ₹ 40,000 For Non-Tech roles – Customer Experience & Talent Acquisition Stipend details - Parameters Amount Fixed ₹ 20,000 Professional Allowance ₹ 2,500 Release Allowance 2,500 Total ₹ 25,000 Duration of internship- 12 MONTHS Fixed For Tech Roles - CTC- 12 LPA (After internship.)-12 LPA includes fixed +Variable +ESOPS For Non-Tech Roles – CTC post Internship will be 5 LPA , Based on performance: Component Amount Fixed 4,00,000 Variable 1,00,000 Total 5,00,000 In hand monthly after Internship- NA
